summary: Diff adds per-scan tag support to the saved scans data model (localStorage migration + persistence), introduces a tag editor UI component for add/edit/remove with keyboard handling, and adds tag-based filtering in the Saved Scans gallery. One area (completion of updateTag persistence and wiring callbacks through PhotoScanner to SavedScansGallery) is truncated in the diff, so full end-to-end behavior cannot be conclusively verified from the provided excerpt.
